name: Corki
title: The Daring Bombardier
shortBio: - Phosphorus Bomb (Q) is an instant explosion

skins.name: UFO Corki
skins.description: Everyone said this model wouldn't fly, but Corki's never let himself be discouraged by others being reasonable.

skins.name: Urfrider Corki
skins.description: Defying all laws of physics, Corki rides Urf the Manatee into battle. With gatling guns ablazing, they charge headlong into the war against Urfwick and all other enemies who may threaten the existence of the peaceful and benevolent Urfs.

skins.name: Dragonwing Corki

chromas.name: Dragonwing Corki (Golden)

descriptions.description: Loot exclusive gained from the 2018 Lunar Revel missions.

chromas.description: Loot exclusive gained from the 2018 Lunar Revel missions.

skins.description: Corki's pit crew made sure to outfit him with a special ship for Lunar Revel, emblazoned with the visage of a dragon to scare off evil spirits. It has been further modified to spray bullets and fire explosives… presumably also to scare off evil spirits.

skins.name: Arcade Corki
skins.description: The fearless protagonist of a 1980s top-down shooter, Corki resists Veigar's battle bosses the same way he resists being shot down by thousands of glowing bullets—move fast, and shoot everything before it shoots him.

skins.name: Corgi Corki

chromas.name: Corgi Corki (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2019.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2019.

skins.description: A dog trainer with some impractical ideas about canine aerodynamics, Corki has entered the world's foremost pet show with a flight-enabled Pembroke Welsh Corgi. Why has he done this? What does he hope to gain? Is he really a Yordle, or just a very small man? These are all important questions.

skins.name: Astronaut Corki

chromas.name: Astronaut Corki (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

skins.description: Commander Corki is both a veteran of the space program and its fearless leader. After traveling to a new and undiscovered planet with his intrepid crew, he befriended a stray alien meep that became his assistant and ally in exploring the galaxy. Together they fly, holding off the encroaching invasion of evil purple meeps that threaten the cosmos.

passive.name: Hextech Shrapnel Shells
passive.description: Corki's basic attacks deal bonus true damage to minions, monsters, and champions.

spells.name: Phosphorus Bomb
spells.description: Corki fires a flash bomb at a target location. This attack reveals non-stealthed units around the blast and champions for 6 seconds.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Deals <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>  to enemies in a target area. In addition, the blast <status>Reveals</status> the area and champions hit by the blast for 6 seconds (does not reveal stealth).

spells.name: Valkyrie
spells.description: Corki surges to target location, dropping bombs that create a trail of destruction for opponents who remain in the fire.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Corki surges to target location, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage </magicDamage>per second to enemies in the fire left along his path.

spells.name: Gatling Gun
spells.description: Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone in front of him, dealing damage and reducing enemy armor.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Corki's gatling gun fires in a cone in front of him for 4 seconds, dealing <physicalDamage>@TotalDamageTooltipOnly@ physical damage</physicalDamage> and <status>reducing @ArmorMod*-1@ armor</status> per second. The armor reduction stacks and lasts 2 seconds.

spells.name: Missile Barrage
spells.description: Corki fires a missile toward his target location that explodes on impact, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Corki stores one missile every 12 seconds up to 7 missiles total. Every 3rd missile will be a Big One, dealing extra damage.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Corki fires a missile toward his targeted location that will collide with the first enemy it hits. Each missile deals @TotalDamage@ magic damage in an area.

This Ability has 7 charges (@AmmoRechargeTime@ second refresh).

Every 3rd missile will be a Big One, dealing @TotalDamageBig@ magic damage instead.
